question: Will Elon Musk become a trillionaire before July 2026?
reason: Elon Musk's net worth is estimated at $808.1 billion as of May 21, 2026, according to Forbes.
evidence: SpaceX's IPO is projected to value the company between $1.75 trillion and $2 trillion, potentially making Musk the world's first trillionaire. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/economy/article/2026/05/21/with-spacex-elon-musk-launches-the-most-spectacular-ipo-ever_6753682_19.html?utm_source=openai))

Musk's compensation package includes 7.5% of the IPO value, amounting to $550 billion, contingent upon achieving specific milestones. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/economy/article/2026/05/21/with-spacex-elon-musk-launches-the-most-spectacular-ipo-ever_6753682_19.html?utm_source=openai))
